title: RULE APPROVAL – HOUSE BUSINESS COMMITTEE – States findings of the House of Representatives and provides that all temporary and pending rules of the Idaho Department of Insurance and the Division of Occupational and Professional Licenses have been reviewed and approved by the House Business Committee, with exceptions.
subject: INSURANCE
OCCUPATIONAL AND PROFESSIONAL LICENSES
RULES

actions.description: Introduced, read first time, referred to JRA for Printing
Reported Printed; Filed for Second Reading
Read second time; Filed for Third Reading
